name: supervibe
description: AI coding agent framework: 83 specialist agents, trigger-safe workflow routing, worktree-ready autonomous loops, design intelligence, 10-language code graph, multilingual semantic RAG, project memory, and confidence rubrics.

interface.shortDescription: 83 specialist agents + trigger-safe workflow routing + worktree loops + code graph.
interface.longDescription: Supervibe turns any AI coding agent into a team of specialists with fixed methodology. Includes trigger-safe workflow routing from brainstorm to plan review to atomic epic execution, worktree-ready autonomous loops with stop/resume/status controls, retrieval-backed design intelligence for designer agents, a code graph (10 languages), multilingual semantic RAG over your codebase, persistent project memory, and confidence-rubric gates that block merges below 9/10. Requires Node 22.5+ with node:sqlite; installers can offer a consent-based Node upgrade before registration. No Docker, no native compilation, no external services.
defaultPrompt: Run /supervibe-genesis to scaffold .claude/ for this project's stack.
Run /supervibe --diagnose-trigger when a workflow trigger does not route.
Who calls processPayment? — show callers with file:line.
Find prior decisions on idempotency in this repo's memory.
